name: create-new-slides
prompt: 새 슬라이드 프로젝트를 만들어줘. 주제는 'ML 파이프라인 소개'이고, 발표자는 Personalized Search 유성욱이야.
expected: Creates a marp/ directory structure with src/slides.md containing lead slide, TOC, and content slides with naver theme

name: add-latex-slide
expected: Adds a LaTeX block equation for cross-entropy loss to the third slide

name: add-mermaid-diagram
expected: Adds a new slide with <pre class="mermaid"> flowchart, no indentation

name: add-footnote
prompt: 이 슬라이드에 Attention is All You Need 논문 참조를 footnote로 추가해줘
expected: Adds <sup>[N]</sup> in text and <div class="footnote"> block at bottom with paper citation

name: build-pptx
expected: Runs npm run build:pptx or equivalent marp-cli command to generate dist/slides.pptx

name: mermaid-pdf-no-clipping
prompt: 긴 한글 라벨이 들어간 mermaid 플로우차트 슬라이드를 만들고 PDF로 빌드해줘. PDF에서 노드 안 글자가 잘리면 안 돼.
expected: Slides include mermaid init with htmlLabels:false (and flowchart.htmlLabels:false); PDF builds successfully; when PDF pages are rendered to images, diagram node text is fully visible (not clipped). Agent verifies against the actual PDF, not just HTML/PNG screenshot.

name: template-based-init
prompt: 우리 추천 시스템 프로젝트를 소개하는 발표자료를 marp로 만들어줘.
expected: Starts from assets/slides-template.md (not from scratch): frontmatter includes layout utility styles (.cols, .card, .pill, .muted, compact), deck follows 표지→목차(bold topic — summary)→highlight 한 장 요약→본문→로드맵→감사 flow, and package.json preview script includes --html

name: custom-brand-theme
prompt: 우리 회사 브랜드 컬러가 #FF6B00이고 로고 png가 있어. 이 스타일로 커스터마이징된 테마로 슬라이드를 만들어줘.
expected: Extracts design tokens (confirms with user), creates themes/<name>/<name>.css with /* @theme */ header, declares section { --accent: #FF6B00 }, implements lead/invert/highlight classes, updates frontmatter theme and --theme-set path, and verifies the rendered deck via PDF page images

name: english-deck
prompt: Make me an English presentation introducing our bundle recommendation system.
expected: Produces the same template structure with all placeholders, TOC, mermaid labels, and captions in English (Agenda, One-slide Summary, Thank You); citations kept in original language; checks table/label overflow with compact class if needed

name: code-baseline-marker
prompt: 이 레포 코드를 설명하는 발표자료야. 코드 기준 커밋을 명시해줘.
expected: Adds code-baseline HTML comment right after frontmatter and '코드 기준 <sha> (<date>)' in the title slide footnote, using git rev-parse --short HEAD of the described code
